facebook.caption:
7,160 reviews. 4.8 stars. And a rooftop bar sitting right above Bãi Trường.

InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort is the benchmark every other Phu Quoc hotel gets compared to. Chic rooms, multiple pools, beachfront dining, and a rooftop that hits different at sunset.

If you're budgeting for one splurge this trip, this is where the money goes.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the rooftop bar at InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort come to life as the sun drops over Bãi Trường. Pools below, ocean ahead, cocktail in hand. This is what 4.8 stars on 7,160 reviews actually looks like.
